claims.summary: Smoothstep onset near entropy 0.85 may be mathematically continuous yet experientially too faint.
claims.disposition: Verified exact gate, near-gate monotonicity, no-pop, and gentler-than-linear tail-lift tests at the named entropy boundary.

claims.summary: The static feature ceiling may flatten meaningful peaks or contaminate reserved dimensions.
claims.disposition: Verified high-entropy tail inputs remain distinguishable below the ceiling and dimensions 44 through 47 remain unchanged.

claims.summary: Onset visibility should be compared across rising, falling, and hovering entropy trajectories.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded codec replay using existing exact outputs and no live dispatch or gain change.

claims.summary: The entropy curve or feature ceiling should change to make subtle high-entropy texture more legible.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because curve and ceiling changes alter live codec projection and gain behavior.
